name: Ham Fritters with Creamy Sauce
recipeInstructions:
Ham Fritters: Combine flour, salt, and baking powder in a bowl. Stir in eggs, milk, and shortening until smooth. Gradually add chopped ham. Drop batter by tablespoon into hot oil heated to 375 degrees Fahrenheit (190 degrees Celsius). Fry until golden brown, then drain on paper towels. Serve hot with sauce.
Yield: 2 dozen fritters.
Creamy Sauce: Melt shortening in a pan over low heat. Add flour and salt, stirring until smooth. Cook for 1 minute. Gradually add milk, cooking over medium heat until thickened. Stir in cheese until melted. Serve over the fritters.
Yield: 2 cups sauce.
